paths.name: @/config/prisma
paths.message: The Prisma client may only be imported in repository adapters (repositories/*.prisma.ts), repositories/rbac.repository.ts, and services/audit.service.ts. See AGENTS.md section 2 / CODING_STANDARDS.md section 8.

paths.name: @prisma/client
paths.message: Import Prisma TYPES with `import type { ... } from '@prisma/client'`. The runtime client is only used in *.prisma.ts adapters. See AGENTS.md section 2.

patterns.message: Controllers and routes must not import repositories directly. Go through the service. See CODING_STANDARDS.md section 8.

paths.name: @/config/prisma
paths.message: Prisma is only imported in repository adapters and the RBAC/audit infra. See AGENTS.md section 2.
